question: 我们公司一共有几个门店？
expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS store_count FROM qft_store WHERE company_id = 1001 AND is_delete = 0;
expected_answer_description: 返回门店总数，应为 3 个（城东、城西、城北）
notes: 最基础的单表 COUNT 查询，验证 company_id 和 is_delete 过滤

question: 我们公司管了几个小区？
expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS property_count FROM qft_area_property WHERE company_id = 1001 AND is_delete = 0;
expected_answer_description: 返回物业小区数量，应为 5 个
notes: 单表 COUNT 查询，物业地址即小区

question: 城东门店管了多少套整租房源？
expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS housing_count FROM qft_whole_housing WHERE company_id = 1001 AND store_id = 10001 AND is_delete = 0 AND is_check_out = 0;
expected_answer_description: 返回城东门店整租房源数量，应为 4 套（30001-30004）
notes: 单表查询，需理解'城东门店'对应 store_id=10001，注意 is_check_out 条件

question: 合租房间总共有多少间空着的？
expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS vacant_count FROM qft_joint_room WHERE company_id = 1001 AND is_delete = 0 AND is_lease = 0;
expected_answer_description: 返回空置合租房间数，is_lease=0 表示未出租，应为 18 间
notes: 单表查询，理解'空着的'映射到 is_lease=0

question: 张三的房租是多少钱一个月？
expected_sql: SELECT tenants_name, lease_price FROM qft_joint_tenants WHERE company_id = 1001 AND tenants_name = '张三' AND is_delete = 0;
expected_answer_description: 返回张三的月租金 1200.00 元
notes: 单表精确查找租客信息，验证按姓名检索能力

question: 我们一共收了多少笔财务流水？总金额是多少？
expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_count, SUM(money) AS total_amount FROM qft_finance WHERE company_id = 1001 AND is_delete = 0 AND nature = 1;
expected_answer_description: 返回收入流水笔数（10 笔）和总金额（24400.00 元）
notes: 单表聚合，nature=1 表示收入

question: 智能设备一共装了多少个？门锁、电表、水表各多少？
expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_devices, SUM(CASE WHEN device_type = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS lock_count, SUM(CASE WHEN device_type = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS meter_count, SUM(CASE WHEN device_type = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS water_count FROM qft_smart_device WHERE is_delete = 0;
expected_answer_description: 返回各类智能设备数量分类统计（若种子数据尚未包含则为 0）
notes: 单表 CASE WHEN 分类统计，device_type: 1=门锁, 2=电表, 3=水表

question: 有没有签过电子合同？有几份？
expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS contract_count FROM qft_electronics_contract WHERE company_id = 1001 AND is_delete = 0;
expected_answer_description: 返回电子合同总数（若种子数据尚未包含则为 0）
notes: 单表查询合同域，验证对合同表的识别

question: 翡翠城小区有几套整租房？
expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS housing_count FROM qft_whole_housing wh JOIN qft_area_property ap ON wh.property_adrr = ap.id WHERE wh.company_id = 1001 AND wh.is_delete = 0 AND wh.is_check_out = 0 AND ap.property_adrr = '翡翠城小区' AND ap.is_delete = 0;
expected_answer_description: 返回翡翠城小区的整租房源数量，应为 2 套（30001, 30002）
notes: 双表 JOIN，物业地址通过 property_adrr 字段名匹配（qft_whole_housing.property_adrr 是 qft_area_property.id）

question: 刘晓明住在哪个小区？哪个门牌号？
expected_sql: SELECT ap.property_adrr AS community_name, wh.door_number FROM qft_whole_tenants wt JOIN qft_whole_room wr ON wt.room_id = wr.id JOIN qft_whole_housing wh ON wr.housing_id = wh.id JOIN qft_area_property ap ON wh.property_adrr = ap.id WHERE wt.company_id = 1001 AND wt.is_delete = 0 AND wt.tenants_name = '刘晓明';
expected_answer_description: 返回刘晓明住在翡翠城小区，门牌号 1-1-101
notes: 多表 JOIN 链：租客->房间->房源->物业，但核心是找到地址

question: 城东门店哪些合租房间还没租出去？
expected_sql: SELECT jh.door_number, jr.room_number, jr.pricing_money FROM qft_joint_room jr JOIN qft_joint_housing jh ON jr.housing_id = jh.id WHERE jr.company_id = 1001 AND jr.is_delete = 0 AND jr.is_lease = 0 AND jr.store_id = 10001;
expected_answer_description: 返回城东门店未出租的合租房间列表（含门牌号和房间号）
notes: 双表 JOIN，过滤 store_id=10001 + is_lease=0

question: 张三欠了多少钱还没交？
expected_sql: SELECT SUM(i.debt_money) AS total_debt FROM qft_joint_tenants_income i JOIN qft_joint_tenants t ON i.tenants_id = t.id WHERE i.company_id = 1001 AND i.is_delete = 0 AND t.tenants_name = '张三' AND t.is_delete = 0 AND i.debt_money > 0;
expected_answer_description: 返回张三的总欠费金额，应为 1600.00 元（第 3 期账单 95003）
notes: 双表 JOIN，需理解'欠了多少钱'对应 debt_money > 0 的汇总

question: 每个门店分别有多少个整租租客？
expected_sql: SELECT s.name AS store_name, COUNT(wt.id) AS tenant_count FROM qft_whole_tenants wt JOIN qft_whole_room wr ON wt.room_id = wr.id JOIN qft_whole_housing wh ON wr.housing_id = wh.id JOIN qft_store s ON wh.store_id = s.id WHERE wt.company_id = 1001 AND wt.is_delete = 0 GROUP BY s.name;
expected_answer_description: 返回各门店整租租客数：城东 4，城西 4，城北 2
notes: 多表 JOIN + GROUP BY，租客需通过房间关联到房源再到门店

question: 哪些合租租客有欠费？各欠多少？
expected_sql: SELECT t.tenants_name, t.phone, SUM(i.debt_money) AS total_debt FROM qft_joint_tenants_income i JOIN qft_joint_tenants t ON i.tenants_id = t.id WHERE i.company_id = 1001 AND i.is_delete = 0 AND i.debt_money > 0 AND t.is_delete = 0 GROUP BY t.tenants_name, t.phone ORDER BY total_debt DESC;
expected_answer_description: 返回有欠费的合租租客列表及金额：邓宇航(4200)、张三(1600)、王大锤(1300)、尹志强(900)、高飞翔(750)
notes: 双表 JOIN + GROUP BY + 过滤 debt_money > 0

question: 合租这边每个门店的出租率是多少？
expected_sql: SELECT s.name AS store_name, COUNT(*) AS total_rooms, SUM(CASE WHEN jr.is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rented_rooms, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN jr.is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) * 100, 2) AS occupancy_rate FROM qft_joint_room jr JOIN qft_store s ON jr.store_id = s.id WHERE jr.company_id = 1001 AND jr.is_delete = 0 GROUP BY s.name;
expected_answer_description: 返回各门店合租房间出租率（已租/总数*100%）
notes: 需要计算比率，CASE WHEN + 除法，按门店分组

question: 帮我看看有没有装了智能门锁的房间？是哪些房间？
expected_sql: SELECT sd.device_name, sd.device_no, sd.online_state, hd.smart_house_id FROM qft_house_device hd JOIN qft_smart_device sd ON hd.device_id = sd.id WHERE hd.company_id = 1001 AND hd.is_delete = 0 AND sd.is_delete = 0 AND sd.device_type = 1;
expected_answer_description: 返回安装了智能门锁（device_type=1）的房间列表（若种子数据尚未包含则为空）
notes: 双表 JOIN，device_type=1 为门锁

question: 所有整租房源的收房价和出房价差价是多少？哪套赚得最多？
expected_sql: SELECT wh.house_code, wh.door_number, wh.joe_price AS landlord_price, wr.pricing_money AS tenant_price, (wr.pricing_money - wh.joe_price) AS profit FROM qft_whole_housing wh JOIN qft_whole_room wr ON wr.housing_id = wh.id WHERE wh.company_id = 1001 AND wh.is_delete = 0 AND wh.is_check_out = 0 AND wr.is_delete = 0 ORDER BY profit DESC LIMIT 1;
expected_answer_description: 返回每套整租房源的差价，最赚钱的房源（收房价与出房价差距最大的）
notes: 跨房源和房间域，比较 joe_price（收房价）和 pricing_money（出房价）

question: 锦绣花园的合租房间出了几间？还空几间？
expected_sql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN jr.is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rented_count, SUM(CASE WHEN jr.is_lease = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS vacant_count FROM qft_joint_room jr JOIN qft_joint_housing jh ON jr.housing_id = jh.id JOIN qft_area_property ap ON jh.property_adrr = ap.id WHERE jr.company_id = 1001 AND jr.is_delete = 0 AND ap.property_adrr = '锦绣花园' AND ap.is_delete = 0;
expected_answer_description: 返回锦绣花园合租房间的已租和空置数量（房源 60003+60004 共 9 间，5 间已租，4 间空置）
notes: 三表 JOIN（房间->房源->物业），CASE WHEN 统计两类

question: 整租这边每个月应该付给房东多少钱？按门店分一下。
expected_sql: SELECT s.name AS store_name, SUM(wh.joe_price) AS monthly_landlord_payment FROM qft_whole_housing wh JOIN qft_store s ON wh.store_id = s.id WHERE wh.company_id = 1001 AND wh.is_delete = 0 AND wh.is_check_out = 0 GROUP BY s.name;
expected_answer_description: 返回每个门店每月应付房东的收房价总额，分门店汇总
notes: 跨房源和门店域，汇总收房价 joe_price

question: 城北门店合租的欠费租客有谁？欠的是哪个房间的？
expected_sql: SELECT t.tenants_name, t.phone, jh.door_number, jr.room_number, SUM(i.debt_money) AS total_debt FROM qft_joint_tenants_income i JOIN qft_joint_tenants t ON i.tenants_id = t.id JOIN qft_joint_room jr ON i.room_id = jr.id JOIN qft_joint_housing jh ON i.housing_id = jh.id WHERE i.company_id = 1001 AND i.is_delete = 0 AND i.store_id = 10003 AND i.debt_money > 0 AND t.is_delete = 0 GROUP BY t.tenants_name, t.phone, jh.door_number, jr.room_number;
expected_answer_description: 返回城北门店合租欠费租客及其房间信息：邓宇航，5-1-503 A 室，欠 4200 元
notes: 四表 JOIN，跨账单、租客、房间、房源域

question: 整租那边今年一共收到了多少租金？按季度统计一下。
expected_sql: SELECT QUARTER(account_date) AS quarter, COUNT(*) AS count, SUM(money) AS total_income FROM qft_finance WHERE company_id = 1001 AND is_delete = 0 AND nature = 1 AND type = 1 AND account_date >= '2024-01-01' AND account_date < '2025-01-01' GROUP BY QUARTER(account_date) ORDER BY quarter;
expected_answer_description: 返回 2024 年各季度整租租金收入汇总（type=1 为整租类型收入流水）
notes: 时间函数 QUARTER + GROUP BY，需理解'今年'为当年

question: 金沙世纪城出了几个合租租客？每间收多少？
expected_sql: SELECT jt.tenants_name, jr.room_number, jh.door_number, jt.lease_price FROM qft_joint_tenants jt JOIN qft_joint_room jr ON jt.room_id = jr.id JOIN qft_joint_housing jh ON jr.housing_id = jh.id JOIN qft_area_property ap ON jh.property_adrr = ap.id WHERE jt.company_id = 1001 AND jt.is_delete = 0 AND ap.property_adrr = '金沙世纪城' AND ap.is_delete = 0;
expected_answer_description: 返回金沙世纪城小区的合租租客列表、房间号及月租价格
notes: 四表 JOIN，按小区名称过滤关联到具体租客信息

question: 哪些房源快到期了？三个月内托管到期的整租房有哪些？
expected_sql: SELECT wh.house_code, wh.housing_name, wh.door_number, ap.property_adrr, wh.hosting_end_time FROM qft_whole_housing wh JOIN qft_area_property ap ON wh.property_adrr = ap.id WHERE wh.company_id = 1001 AND wh.is_delete = 0 AND wh.is_check_out = 0 AND wh.hosting_end_time >= CURDATE() AND wh.hosting_end_time <= DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 3 MONTH) ORDER BY wh.hosting_end_time ASC;
expected_answer_description: 返回三个月内托管到期的整租房源列表（取决于查询时间，种子数据中有到 2025 年到期的）
notes: 日期函数 DATE_ADD + CURDATE()，理解'快到期'为三个月内

question: 合租租客的合同快到期的有哪些？一个月内到期的。
expected_sql: SELECT jt.tenants_name, jt.phone, jt.lease_endtime, jh.door_number, jr.room_number FROM qft_joint_tenants jt JOIN qft_joint_room jr ON jt.room_id = jr.id JOIN qft_joint_housing jh ON jr.housing_id = jh.id WHERE jt.company_id = 1001 AND jt.is_delete = 0 AND jt.lease_endtime >= CURDATE() AND jt.lease_endtime <= DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH) ORDER BY jt.lease_endtime ASC;
expected_answer_description: 返回一个月内合同到期的合租租客列表（取决于查询时间）
notes: 日期范围查询，三表 JOIN

question: 我们一共有多少套房子？整租合租加起来。
expected_sql: SELECT SUM(cnt) AS total_housing FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM qft_whole_housing WHERE company_id = 1001 AND is_delete = 0 AND is_check_out = 0 UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM qft_joint_housing WHERE company_id = 1001 AND is_delete = 0 AND is_check_out = 0) t;
expected_answer_description: 返回整租 + 合租房源总数，应为 20 套（整租 10 + 合租 10）
notes: UNION ALL 跨两种业务模式统计，需要识别整租和合租是不同的表

question: 所有租客里面，谁的月租最贵？谁的最便宜？分整租和合租都看看。
expected_sql: SELECT '整租' AS type, tenants_name, lease_price FROM (SELECT tenants_name, lease_price FROM qft_whole_tenants WHERE company_id = 1001 AND is_delete = 0 ORDER BY lease_price DESC LIMIT 1) t1 UNION ALL SELECT '整租' AS type, tenants_name, lease_price FROM (SELECT tenants_name, lease_price FROM qft_whole_tenants WHERE company_id = 1001 AND is_delete = 0 ORDER BY lease_price ASC LIMIT 1) t2 UNION ALL SELECT '合租' AS type, tenants_name, lease_price FROM (SELECT tenants_name, lease_price FROM qft_joint_tenants WHERE company_id = 1001 AND is_delete = 0 ORDER BY lease_price DESC LIMIT 1) t3 UNION ALL SELECT '合租' AS type, tenants_name, lease_price FROM (SELECT tenants_name, lease_price FROM qft_joint_tenants WHERE company_id = 1001 AND is_delete = 0 ORDER BY lease_price ASC LIMIT 1) t4;
expected_answer_description: 返回整租最贵（马晓峰 5000）、整租最便宜（陈小龙 2500）、合租最贵（邓宇航 1400）、合租最便宜（尹志强 900）
notes: UNION ALL + 子查询，跨整租合租两个租客表

question: 整租应支和合租应收总共欠了多少钱？哪边欠的多？
expected_sql: SELECT '整租应支' AS bill_type, SUM(arrear_money) AS total_arrear FROM qft_whole_bill_expend WHERE company_id = 1001 AND is_delete = 0 AND arrear_money > 0 UNION ALL SELECT '合租应收' AS bill_type, SUM(debt_money) AS total_arrear FROM qft_joint_tenants_income WHERE company_id = 1001 AND is_delete = 0 AND debt_money > 0;
notes: UNION ALL 跨两种账单表，注意整租用 arrear_money，合租用 debt_money

question: 每个门店整租和合租各收了多少租金流水？哪个门店总流水最高？
expected_sql: SELECT s.name AS store_name, SUM(CASE WHEN f.house_code LIKE 'ZZ%' THEN f.money ELSE 0 END) AS whole_income, SUM(CASE WHEN f.house_code LIKE 'HZ%' THEN f.money ELSE 0 END) AS joint_income, SUM(f.money) AS total_income FROM qft_finance f JOIN qft_store s ON f.store_id = s.id WHERE f.company_id = 1001 AND f.is_delete = 0 AND f.nature = 1 GROUP BY s.name ORDER BY total_income DESC;
expected_answer_description: 返回各门店按整租/合租分类的收入流水及总流水排名
notes: CASE WHEN + GROUP BY + ORDER BY，通过 house_code 前缀区分业务类型

question: 帮我算一下每个门店的收支利润，收入减支出等于多少？
expected_sql: SELECT s.name AS store_name, SUM(CASE WHEN f.nature = 1 THEN f.money ELSE 0 END) AS total_income, SUM(CASE WHEN f.nature = 0 THEN f.money ELSE 0 END) AS total_expense, SUM(CASE WHEN f.nature = 1 THEN f.money ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN f.nature = 0 THEN f.money ELSE 0 END) AS profit FROM qft_finance f JOIN qft_store s ON f.store_id = s.id WHERE f.company_id = 1001 AND f.is_delete = 0 GROUP BY s.name ORDER BY profit DESC;
expected_answer_description: 返回各门店收入、支出和利润：城东门店收入较多但支出也多，城西和城北相对盈利情况
notes: CASE WHEN 条件聚合 + 运算，nature=0 支出，nature=1 收入，一次查询完成收支汇总

question: 总收入和总支出分别是多少？盈亏情况怎么样？
expected_sql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 1 THEN money ELSE 0 END) AS total_income, SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 0 THEN money ELSE 0 END) AS total_expense, SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 1 THEN money ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 0 THEN money ELSE 0 END) AS net_profit FROM qft_finance WHERE company_id = 1001 AND is_delete = 0;
notes: CASE WHEN 条件聚合计算盈亏，一条 SQL 完成
